title: Red Zinger Mini Classic The great peppi Schwinne team

transcript.text: Here's the great Pepe Schwinn team, Schwinn bicycle team. Hi guys.
Here's the Red Zinger, here's the Schwinn team all together. They're a fast group.
Here's the Red Zinger mini classic Schwinn team, first day July 14th 1985.
Hill climb time trial, Chautauqua Park, Boulder, Colorado.
